description: The ReflectionProbe component is used to make points in space that makes reflective surfaces within a box around the point show a different reflection map than the skybox. This is useful for controlling the lighting and look of a scene.

fields.ProbeType: What mode this reflection probe uses.
fields.Importance: How much priority this probe takes over another probe when two probes overlap
fields.Intensity: how strong or bright the reflection is
fields.BlendDistance: how far the probe will slowly take over the reflection map of objects as an object goes towards the center of influence
fields.BoxSize: the area that this reflection probe will affect the reflection maps of objects
fields.BoxProjection: project the reflection map in a box shape from the reflection probe rather than a sphere.
fields.BakedCubemap: The cube map to replace the refection maps of reflective objects with in the influence area of this reflection probe
fields.ChangesSources: A list of elements that will prompt this reflection probe to render a new map whenever they change.
fields.TimeSlicing: How updates to this reflection probe should happen in updates if this probe is a realtime probe.
fields.Resolution: the forced resolution of the reflection map from this reflection probe shown in the reflections of shiny objects.
fields.HDR: Whether the color encoding should be in HDR.
fields.ShadowDistance: how far to render shadows from the reflection probe
fields.ClearFlags: Whether to use the skybox or color when backing transparent pixels
fields.BackgroundColor: The color to clear with when ``ClearFlags`` is set to "Color"
fields.NearClip: The closest distance to render from the reflection probe center when using "Realtime" on ``ProbeType``
fields.FarClip: The furthest distance to render from the reflection probe center when using "Realtime" on ``ProbeType``
fields.SkyboxOnly: Whether to render only the skybox or not.
fields.ShowDebugVisuals: Shows the box influence area and the center point of this reflection probe
fields._debugVisual: The current debug visual that this reflection probe is showing, if applicable.

methods.OnBake: Called when the bake button is touched.
methods.Bake: Creates a static cubemap and inserts it into ``BakedCubemap`` instead of having ``ProbeType`` be set to realtime.

usage: Attach to a slot to start using this component as a point source for reflection map data.
